# libredash config

Inspect and validate process-global configuration

## Usage

```sh
libredash config
```

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |

## Subcommands

- `libredash validate`: Validate the active server environment
